title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Saturn, Franky, Luffy, York as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it all! Our dream, the vega force 1 has been...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This is unforgivable! Is the sunny okay?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Straw hat" has just been blown away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kids these days sure grow fast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have a grudge on him right? I have been given orders to assassination...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: the Dr. Vega- punk that you hate...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: My enemy target has changed! Bonney:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please don't make me hurt people I know more than I already have!
